overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins depicting a Medjay character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The character moves from an interior ceremonial hall with decorated columns through hieroglyphic corridors and into a sunlit courtyard with palm trees, eventually reaching an outdoor shrine featuring a large sphinx statue surrounded by ceremonial offerings.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand temple hall with ceremonial decorations and scattered petals

events.description: character begins walking forward through the temple hall
large decorated column temporarily blocks view of the distant shrine

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple hall, passing by decorated columns and scattered flower petals on the marble floor

notable_agents.action: temple priest in white robes walking left across the hall
civilian in blue clothing walking away from the camera

entered.detail: tall stone columns with red and blue painted hieroglyphic patterns and bands
colorful flower petals strewn across the polished marble floor
large golden shrine or statue visible in the background archway
ornate patterned rugs placed on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grand temple interior with massive decorated columns featuring Egyptian motifs. Colorful flower petals are scattered across the marble floor, and ceremonial rugs line the path. Other temple visitors in period clothing walk through the space as the character moves toward a golden shrine visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple corridor with hieroglyphic wall reliefs

events.description: moving from open hall into narrower corridor with detailed wall carvings
approaching the temple exit, light levels increase significantly from the doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple corridor toward the bright exit, passing walls covered in hieroglyphic reliefs

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the wall in the distance

entered.detail: stone walls covered with carved Egyptian hieroglyphics and figures in blue and red paint
white cloth banners hanging between columns and archways
large dark granite sarcophagus with golden decorative trim

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open hall into a narrower corridor where walls are covered in detailed hieroglyphic carvings. White fabric banners hang between the architectural elements, and a large dark sarcophagus sits against the right wall. The lighting gradually brightens as the character approaches the temple exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with palm trees and monumental statues

events.description: exits the temple into bright outdoor courtyard with palm trees
character turns left to walk past the large seated pharaoh statue

agents.ego_description: emerging into the sunlit courtyard and walking toward the garden areas, passing by a massive seated statue

notable_agents.action: civilian walking along the courtyard wall in the distance

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the courtyard walls against the blue sky
massive stone statue of a seated pharaoh holding a staff against the wall
geometric patterned stone flooring in the open courtyard
tall stone walls with Egyptian carvings and hieroglyphics

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the temple into a bright sunlit courtyard with palm trees swaying against a blue sky. A massive seated pharaoh statue dominates the left side of the courtyard. The ground features geometric stone tiles, and the character turns left to walk past the monumental sculpture toward a garden area.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden pathway with irrigation pool and overgrown vegetation

events.description: moving from open courtyard into narrower garden path between walls
passing by a rectangular stone pool with water and lily pads

agents.ego_description: walking along the garden pathway between stone walls, passing an irrigation pool

entered.detail: rectangular stone pool with water, lily pads, and green algae
lush green plants, bushes, and red flowers growing along the path edges
uneven stone slabs with grass and weeds growing between the cracks

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open courtyard into a narrower garden pathway flanked by stone walls. On the right, a rectangular irrigation pool contains water with lily pads. The path is lined with overgrown vegetation including bushes and flowering plants. The stone pathway shows signs of age with grass growing between the slabs.

scene_state.functional_zone: sphinx shrine with ceremonial offerings and altar

events.description: entering the sphinx shrine area with ceremonial offerings visible
character slows down and approaches the sphinx statue closely

agents.ego_description: approaching the large sphinx statue and examining the ceremonial offerings arranged on rugs

entered.detail: large dark stone sphinx statue with detailed wing and body carvings
fruit, candles, flowers, and vessels arranged on patterned rugs before the statue
covered pavilion structure with columns in the background

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at an open shrine area featuring a massive dark stone sphinx statue. Ceremonial offerings including fruit, lit candles, and flowers are arranged on ornate rugs at the statue's base. The ground transitions to sandy soil, and a stone pavilion is visible in the background as the character slows to approach the monument.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand, ceremonial temple interior into a narrow, light-filled corridor. It begins by following the character through a vast hall of massive decorated columns, moving across marble floors scattered with colorful flower petals and ceremonial rugs amidst other temple visitors. As the character advances toward a distant golden shrine, the open space tightens into a narrower passage where the walls are densely covered in detailed hieroglyphic carvings. The scene then shifts past hanging white fabric banners and a large dark sarcophagus resting against the wall, while the lighting gradually brightens as the camera pushes toward the temple exit.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, monumental temple courtyard into a secluded garden and finally toward a sacred outdoor shrine. It begins as the character emerges into the sunlight, passing a massive seated pharaoh statue and swaying palm trees under a clear blue sky. As the character turns left, the open space narrows into a garden pathway where geometric stone tiles give way to aged slabs with grass growing between them, flanked by a lily-filled irrigation pool and overgrown flowering bushes. The scene then opens up as the path transitions from stone to sandy soil, leading the character toward a massive dark stone sphinx. Finally, the camera slows as it approaches the monument, revealing ornate rugs laden with lit candles, fruit, and flowers before a distant stone pavilion.
